prompt: "Convert the baby siblings in the photo into Japanese miniature figures (Nendoroid style, SD ratio). - Cute chibi proportions with large heads and small bodies - Smooth PVC/vinyl texture with subtle gloss - Large eyes and soft, lovely expressions, maintaining original facial features and hairstyle - Standing on a transparent acrylic base - Product photo composition with a figure box package placed next to it - Studio lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field - Simple white or light gradient background - Realistic textures and details like an actual figure photo"
promptEn: "Convert the baby siblings in the photo into Japanese miniature figures (Nendoroid style, SD ratio). - Cute chibi proportions with large heads and small bodies - Smooth PVC/vinyl texture with subtle gloss - Large eyes and soft, lovely expressions, maintaining original facial features and hairstyle - Standing on a transparent acrylic base - Product photo composition with a figure box package placed next to it - Studio lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field - Simple white or light gradient background - Realistic textures and details like an actual figure photo"
promptZh: “将照片中的 宝宝兄弟姐妹 转换为日式微缩手办（Nendoroid 风格，SD 比例）。- 可爱的 Q 版比例，大头小身 - 光滑的 PVC/乙烯基质感，带有细腻的光泽 - 大眼睛和柔和可爱的表情，同时保留原始的面部特征和发型 - 站立在透明亚克力底座上 - 产品摄影构图，旁边放置着手办包装盒 - 影棚灯光，柔和阴影，浅景深 - 简洁的白色或浅色渐变背景 - 逼真的质感和细节，如同真实的手办摄影”
